<?php /** * PublicKey interface * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2009 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\Crypt\Common; /** * PublicKey interface * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ interface PublicKey { public function verify($message, $signature); //public function encrypt($plaintext); public function toString($type, array $options = []); public function getFingerprint($algorithm); }
